Mamdani raised her case directly with Trump while also discussing housing investment plans for New York City.

This escalation follows earlier Pakistani airstrikes targeting militant camps, which Afghanistan alleged killed civilians.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026 crisis: Canada seen as safest gateway
description: Travel restrictions in the United States and rising security concerns in Mexico are complicating plans for the FIFA World Cup 2026. With visa bans affecting many nations and violence raising safety worries near host cities, Canada is emerging as the most accessible and stable destination. Its streamlined visa system and secure environment could shift fan travel and boost attendance there.

title: Megyn Kelly responds to rumor over Candace Owens’ Bride of Charlie series
description: Megyn Kelly strongly denied rumors that she helped Candace Owens produce the Bride of Charlie series about Erika Kirk. After an X user claimed she screened the series and offered legal advice, Kelly responded, calling the allegation false and the poster a “filthy liar.” She also previously said she has criticized Owens many times and does not comment on every controversy.

title: Dalit family attacked for playing loud music after namaz in UP; 12 held
description: Twelve individuals were apprehended in Bulandshahr for allegedly assaulting a Dalit family during a naming ceremony. The dispute reportedly erupted over loud music following local prayers. The attackers, armed with sticks, allegedly used casteist slurs and damaged property. Police have registered an FIR and sent the accused to jail, with further arrests anticipated.

description: Wrestling icon AJ Styles has officially hung up his boots in February 2026, retiring after a career-ending match and soon after, earning a WWE Hall of Fame induction. He and wife Wendy Jones, married since 2000, are now prioritizing family life in Georgia.
